name: hero-homepage
prompt: Realistic documentary-style photograph, 35mm lens, shallow depth of field. A young Pakistani woman in her mid-20s sits in the driver's seat of a clean modern white sedan (Toyota Corolla or Suzuki Swift style), hands at 9-and-3 on steering wheel, calm focused expression with a slight confident smile, warm olive complexion. In the passenger seat a female Pakistani driving instructor in her 30s (dupatta draped loosely over shoulders, not on head, in a soft cream or burgundy red long-sleeve top) is gesturing gently toward the windscreen, explaining. Both engaged and warm. Setting: quiet DHA Karachi residential/commercial side street, palm trees in soft background bokeh, a few parked cars, late-afternoon golden hour light through the windscreen. Modern dashboard visible, not luxury. Composition leaves negative space on the left third for headline overlay. Warm earthy color grade, realistic Pakistani faces. No text, no logos, no watermarks, no over-smoothed skin, no AI-artefact hands.

name: hero-ladies
prompt: Realistic warm documentary-style photograph. A young Pakistani woman in her early 20s sits confidently in the driver's seat of a clean modern automatic sedan (Toyota Yaris or Honda City style), hands at 10-and-2 on the steering wheel, gaze focused ahead with a subtle smile. Next to her in the passenger seat a female Pakistani driving instructor in her 30s wearing a soft cream hijab and a burgundy-red long-sleeve shirt, smiling encouragingly and nodding. Both women relaxed, partnership energy. Soft golden afternoon light through the windscreen. Interior clean, dual-brake pedal subtly visible on passenger side. Outside: quiet Karachi residential street, palm fronds in bokeh. Warm skin tones, natural hair, no heavy makeup. Composition empty space on left third for headline. No text, no logos, no over-smoothed skin.

name: hero-dha
prompt: Realistic photograph, natural afternoon light. View from front-right of a silver or white sedan parked on a tree-lined DHA Phase 6 Karachi commercial street — low-rise shops, palm trees, wide road (Ittehad Commercial style). Through the windscreen a young Pakistani woman at the wheel with focused expression and a female Pakistani instructor in the passenger seat smiling encouragingly. Learner 'L' sticker on back window. Empty street, no traffic, mid-afternoon soft warm light, hint of villas in soft background. Composition: car occupies right 60%, left third empty sky/street for text overlay. Earthy realistic documentary, no over-saturation. No text on signage, no logos, no watermarks.

name: hero-clifton
prompt: Realistic photograph, late-afternoon diffused light. A white Suzuki Swift hatchback approaching a Clifton Block 5 Karachi roundabout — low buildings, a few trees, sidewalk, soft sea-breeze sky. Through the open driver-side window we see a Pakistani woman in her late 20s at the wheel, both hands at 9-and-3, making a gentle turn with focused expression. A female Pakistani instructor in the passenger seat gestures forward. Warm tones, natural contrast. Leave left third of frame clear for text overlay. No text on signage, no logos.

name: hero-automatic
prompt: Realistic close-up photograph, 50mm lens, shallow depth of field. From passenger-side interior angle, we see a young Pakistani woman's right hand (warm olive complexion, small gold bracelet on wrist) resting on the automatic gear shifter of a modern clean sedan — P-R-N-D markings subtly visible. Blurred dashboard instrumentation glowing softly in background. Warm afternoon sunlight slants through the windscreen with gentle lens flare. Clean modern black leather interior. No faces in frame — tactile detail-oriented image. Composition leaves negative space top-left. No text, no logos, no watermarks.

name: hero-book
prompt: Realistic photograph. A smiling female Pakistani driving academy receptionist / instructor in her late 20s to early 30s, warm olive complexion, wearing a simple burgundy-red long-sleeve shirt, holds a smartphone to her ear with one hand and a pen in the other. Soft natural window light. Background: softly out-of-focus professional driving academy reception — a clean desk with clipboards, a wall calendar, a hint of a framed road-safety poster, warm cream and white tones with subtle red accent (no text legible). Warm genuine smile, natural skin. No logos on clothing or in frame. Documentary style. Composition leaves room on the right for text overlay.

name: hero-programme
prompt: Realistic photograph, slightly wide-angle. Small classroom setting — five Pakistani students (three women two men, ages 18 to 35, mix of hijabi and non-hijabi women, modest modern clothing) seated at light-wood tables taking notes. At the front a female Pakistani instructor in her 30s in a simple burgundy-red shirt stands beside a whiteboard pointing at abstract road-sign diagrams (stop sign, yield, speed limit shapes — no legible text). Warm natural light through a window on the left. Cream walls, clean professional but not sterile. Documentary style. Composition leaves some space above and right. No legible text anywhere, no logos.

name: hero-traffic-club
prompt: Realistic documentary photograph. A Karachi school playground — mixed Pakistani children aged 8 to 12 in school uniforms (grey trousers, navy skirts, white shirts) gathered around a miniature road layout made of red-and-white traffic cones and chalk lines. A female Pakistani instructor in her 30s in neutral casual clothing (cream shirt, navy trousers) is demonstrating a crosswalk, pointing at a miniature red stop sign. Two kids hold small red-and-white signs. Sunny warm morning light, palm trees, light blue sky. Joyful active educational atmosphere. Slightly candid, natural. No logos, no legible text.

name: team-group
prompt: Realistic environmental group portrait. Six Pakistani driving instructors (majority female, one male) ages 28 to 45 standing in a relaxed natural line beside a clean white modern sedan parked at the curb. Mix of hijabi and non-hijabi women, one male instructor in his 40s in a navy collared shirt. Others in neutral professional clothing — long-sleeve shirts, modest trousers or long kurta tops in cream, burgundy red, navy, beige palette. Natural warm smiles, relaxed poses. Warm late-afternoon DHA Karachi light, palm trees in soft bokeh, cream-coloured low-rise building behind. Subjects look real, not models — warm and approachable. No logos on clothing. Natural skin, no heavy retouching. Landscape composition.

name: book-sidebar-team
prompt: Realistic environmental group portrait. Six to eight Pakistani driving instructors (majority female) ages 28 to 45 beside a modern white sedan on a DHA Karachi side street. Mix of hijabi and non-hijabi women, one or two male instructors. Neutral professional attire — cream, burgundy red, navy, beige — no logos. Warm late-afternoon light, palm trees in bokeh, cream building in background. Relaxed natural smiles, not posed. Subjects look real and approachable. Landscape composition suitable for sidebar. No text, no logos, natural skin.

name: instructor-omaima
prompt: Realistic natural-light headshot portrait of a Pakistani woman in her early 30s. Shoulder-length dark brown hair loose or lightly tied back, warm olive complexion, subtle natural makeup, small stud earrings. Wearing a soft burgundy-red long-sleeve shirt, modest. Warm natural daylight from camera-left, soft shadow on right cheek. Genuine warm calm smile, eyes to camera. Background softly blurred cream wall with slight warm glow. 50mm lens look, documentary portrait feel, not corporate headshot. Natural skin texture visible. No text, no logos.

name: instructor-farkhanda
prompt: Realistic natural-light headshot portrait of a Pakistani woman in her late 30s to early 40s wearing a soft taupe or cream hijab wrapped modestly under chin, warm complexion, gentle laugh lines around eyes (experienced and confident). Wearing a simple charcoal or burgundy-red long-sleeve top. Confident approachable smile, eyes slightly crinkled. Natural afternoon daylight from window side. Background softly out-of-focus interior, neutral warm tones. Documentary-style portrait, real and warm, not glamour-retouched. 50mm shallow depth of field. No text, no logos.

name: instructor-zainab
prompt: Realistic natural-light headshot portrait of a Pakistani woman in her mid to late 20s, dark hair pulled back in a low ponytail, no hijab, warm golden-brown complexion, small gold hoop earrings, energetic modern look. Wearing a simple cream-coloured button-down shirt, sleeves rolled to elbows. Natural daylight overhead slightly front-left. Relaxed slight smile, looking at camera. Background soft out-of-focus outdoor greenery (palm fronds). Candid documentary feel, not staged. 50mm portrait. No text, no logos.

name: instructor-tehreem
prompt: Realistic natural-light headshot portrait of a Pakistani woman in her early 30s wearing a soft plum-coloured chiffon dupatta draped loosely over shoulders (not covering head), dark hair loose around shoulders, warm complexion, light natural makeup. Wearing a muted burgundy-red kurta neckline visible. Genuine warm patient smile, teeth showing naturally. Standing outdoors in soft late-afternoon light, palm trees blurred behind. Looking slightly off-camera to the right. Documentary portrait feel. No text, no logos.

name: instructor-muzaffar
prompt: Realistic natural-light headshot portrait of a Pakistani man in his early 40s, short dark hair, warm complexion, neat trimmed short beard, professional trustworthy expression, wearing a soft navy or charcoal collared shirt. Calm warm approachable smile, eyes to camera. Natural daylight. Background softly blurred neutral cream wall. Documentary portrait style, professional but warm. No text, no logos.

name: faryal-portrait
prompt: Realistic natural-light founder-style portrait of a Pakistani woman in her late 30s to early 40s, shoulder-length dark hair with subtle natural waves, warm olive complexion, kind confident eyes, light natural makeup, small gold earrings. Wearing a well-tailored deep burgundy-red blazer or kurta over cream top. Warm confident professional smile, eyes directly to camera. Soft natural light from a large window camera-left. Background slightly blurred modern office setting with hints of books, a plant, warm wood tones, and a subtle glimpse of a clean sedan visible through a window in the distance. Business-casual, approachable but competent. Documentary editorial feel, 50mm, real skin texture, no heavy retouching. Composition portrait orientation, subject occupies center-right, soft negative space top-left. No text, no logos.

name: student-smiling-driver-seat
prompt: Realistic photograph shot from passenger-side diagonal. A young Pakistani woman in her early 20s (warm olive complexion) in the driver's seat of a clean modern Toyota Yaris or Honda City, hands on the wheel, head turned slightly toward camera, beaming broadly with genuine 'I just did it' excitement. Car parked, key natural light through windscreen. Seatbelt visible. Clean car interior. Background through side window: soft bokeh of DHA Karachi commercial street with palm trees. Natural warm tones, documentary feel, no posed-model energy. No text, no logos.

name: instructor-guiding-wheel
prompt: Realistic photograph from passenger POV looking slightly across. Close-up of a female Pakistani instructor's hand (warm olive skin, subtle bracelet) gently guiding a young Pakistani woman student's hand on the steering wheel of a clean modern sedan. Faces not in frame — this is about the tactile teaching moment. Soft warm daylight coming through windscreen. Through the glass blurred quiet DHA tree-lined street. Natural skin, no retouching, documentary style. No text, no logos.

name: parallel-parking-practice
prompt: Realistic photograph from across-the-street angle. A white sedan mid-manoeuvre parallel-parking between two other cars on a narrow DHA commercial side street (Bukhari Commercial style). Front wheels angled, car slightly into the spot. Warm afternoon light. Sidewalk with palm tree, empty side of street, cream-coloured low-rise building, shop shutters pulled down. Real Karachi context. Documentary, slightly candid, no posing. Car clean but everyday. No legible text on shops, no logos.

name: contextual-night-drive
prompt: Realistic photograph from behind the driver (over-the-shoulder interior angle). Through the windscreen: a wide Karachi main road at early dusk / blue hour, warm orange streetlights beginning to turn on, a few cars ahead with red tail lights, light traffic. Soft dashboard glow visible, student's hands on wheel visible, female Pakistani instructor in passenger seat in soft silhouette. Mood calm confident. Slight motion blur on passing headlights. Realistic cinematic but not over-stylised. No legible text on signage, no logos.

name: contextual-street-pov
prompt: Realistic photograph from driver's first-person perspective — windshield frame visible at top and sides, dashboard bottom. Road ahead: a quiet DHA Karachi commercial street (Jami or Ittehad style), tree-lined, low-rise shops on both sides, palm trees, warm afternoon light, a couple of parked cars ahead, light manageable traffic. Peaceful for a learner. Natural warm color grade. No legible text on shops or signage, no logos.

name: completion-certificate-closeup
prompt: Realistic close-up photograph, shallow depth of field. Hands of a young Pakistani woman (warm olive skin, simple bracelet) holding a simple elegant printed certificate — cream paper with a subtle red and black ribbon or trim. The text on the certificate is intentionally blurred / abstract (no legible words, just shapes suggesting a heading, body, and signature line). Background softly blurred modern classroom with warm wood tones, hint of a green plant. Warm natural light. Aspirational warm symbolic. No legible text anywhere, no logos.

name: og-homepage
prompt: Realistic landscape photograph 1200x630. Right two-thirds: through the open passenger-side window we see a young Pakistani woman student at the wheel of a clean white sedan, female Pakistani instructor beside her (soft cream hijab, burgundy-red shirt) pointing at the dashboard, both mid-conversation. Warm golden-hour DHA Karachi commercial street backdrop. Left third: softly blurred street and sky, empty for headline overlay. Warm earthy palette — cream, warm red accents, soft neutrals. No text, no logos.

name: og-packages
prompt: Realistic landscape photograph. Right half: a modern clean car dashboard with keys in the ignition, a folded simple price sheet (no legible text, just abstract printed lines) resting on the dashboard, a pen beside it. Composition feels 'confident decision.' Soft warm daylight. Left half: softly blurred interior of car, empty for overlay text. No legible text on paper, no logos.

name: og-book
prompt: Realistic landscape photograph. Right half: a Pakistani woman's hand holding a smartphone, a generic green-and-white messaging chat interface visible but text intentionally blurred and illegible. Phone tilted at natural angle, warm daylight. Left half: soft cream-coloured wooden table surface, empty for headline. Documentary style. No legible text on screen, no logos.

name: og-about
prompt: Realistic environmental landscape group photograph. Four to five Pakistani women (mix of hijabi and non-hijabi, ages 28 to 45, modest professional clothing — cream, burgundy red, navy, beige palette) standing casually in a relaxed pose beside a clean white sedan. Warm golden late-afternoon light, DHA Karachi commercial street backdrop with palm trees. Subjects occupy right 60% of frame, left third negative space with soft street bokeh. Natural confident documentary feel. No text, no logos on clothing.

name: og-faq
prompt: Realistic landscape photograph. Right half: a smiling young Pakistani woman student holding an open driving manual or handbook in her lap while seated in a car's driver seat, looking slightly toward camera as if asking a question, warm expression. Through passenger-side window natural daylight. Left half: soft out-of-focus street through the window, negative space. Warm approachable documentary feel. Book pages blurred — no legible text anywhere. No logos.

name: og-program
prompt: Realistic landscape photograph, split composition. Right half: a simple whiteboard with abstract road-sign sketches in marker (not legible), a hand with a marker pointing. Left half: through a window, a soft view of a clean sedan parked outside in warm afternoon light. Symbolism: theory plus practical. Cream walls, educational feel, no legible text, no logos.

name: og-ladies
prompt: Realistic landscape photograph. Right two-thirds: two Pakistani women in a clean sedan — instructor (soft cream hijab, burgundy-red shirt, warm smile) in passenger seat gesturing toward student (young woman, hands on wheel, focused). Warm daylight. Left third: soft out-of-focus DHA Karachi street, empty for headline. Warm empathetic documentary feel, both women natural and at ease. No text, no logos.

name: og-dha
prompt: Realistic landscape photograph. Right two-thirds: a clean white sedan with a learner 'L' sticker on a tree-lined DHA Phase 6 Karachi street. Palm trees, low-rise cream buildings, soft warm afternoon light. Left third: empty street and sky for text overlay. Warm documentary feel. No readable signage, no logos.

name: og-clifton
prompt: Realistic landscape photograph. Right two-thirds: a white Suzuki Swift hatchback on a Clifton Block 5 Karachi street, soft late-afternoon light, hint of sea-breeze feel, low-rise buildings, a few pedestrians blurred in the distance. Left third: empty sky for overlay. Warm natural tones. No text, no logos.

name: og-automatic
prompt: Realistic landscape photograph, interior close-up. Right half: close-up of a clean modern automatic gear shifter (P-R-N-D visible but abstract, not legible text), a Pakistani woman's hand resting near it with a simple bracelet. Warm sunlight through windscreen. Left half: softly blurred car interior, empty for headline. Documentary tactile. No legible text, no logos.

name: og-traffic-club
prompt: Realistic landscape photograph. Right two-thirds: a group of Pakistani schoolchildren (ages 8 to 12 in school uniforms) gathered around miniature red-and-white traffic cones and signs in a school playground, a female Pakistani instructor gesturing. Warm morning sunshine, palm trees. Left third: empty sky for overlay. Joyful educational real. No legible signage text, no logos.

name: og-careers
prompt: Realistic landscape environmental portrait. Right two-thirds: a female Pakistani driving instructor in her 30s (warm smile, soft hijab, burgundy-red long-sleeve shirt) leaning confidently against a clean white sedan, holding car keys in one hand and a clipboard in the other. Warm daylight, DHA Karachi street backdrop with palm trees. Left third: empty sky for overlay. Documentary aspirational-but-real. No text, no logos.

name: og-press
prompt: Realistic landscape photograph, editorial feel. Right two-thirds: a pair of Pakistani hands (warm olive skin) holding a folded newspaper or magazine with intentionally blurred text (no legible words), next to a clean white sedan in soft afternoon light. Left third: empty space for headline. Warm natural documentary-editorial feel, suitable for press/media preview. No legible text, no logos.
